comment: Please just request a quick question.I was trying to edit a video and I found out that there is no option to change text to speech only audio. A l've made sure the app is up to date so I don't know why it's not working. Oh and it would also be nice if everyone had the same editing features. Allowing them on one phone but not other gets really annoying. I am only talking about TikTok editing which other apps can't find to edit clips. My account @aftab.mahar786
the function of activity: This activity allows users to record and enhance videos, adjust playback speed, add effects, sound, text, music, and post videos.
the sub-task list of state: [{'name': 'Flip', 'description': 'Flip the screen'}, {'name': 'Search effects', 'description': 'Search for effects'}, {'name': 'Favorites', 'description': 'Access favorite effects'}, {'name': 'Trending', 'description': 'Access trending effects'}, {'name': 'Create', 'description': 'Access effect creation tools'}, {'name': '#Ramadan2024', 'description': 'Access Ramadan-themed effects'}, {'name': 'New', 'description': 'Access newly added effects'}, {'name': 'Tool', 'description': 'Access various editing tools'}, {'name': 'Green Screen', 'description': 'Activate green screen feature'}, {'name': 'Atmosphere', 'description': 'Access atmospheric effects'}, {'name': 'Funny', 'description': 'Access funny effects'}, {'name': 'Interactive', 'description': 'Access interactive effects'}, {'name': 'Accessories', 'description': 'Access accessory effects'}, {'name': 'Appearance', 'description': 'Access appearance modification effects'}, {'name': 'Animals', 'description': 'Access animal-themed effects'}, {'name': 'Editing', 'description': 'Access editing tools'}, {'name': 'Events', 'description': 'Access event-themed effects'}, {'name': 'Music', 'description': 'Access music-related effects'}, {'name': 'AR', 'description': 'Access augmented reality effects'}, {'name': 'Add effects to Favorites', 'description': 'Add effects to Favorites for later use'}, {'name': 'Select a template', 'description': 'Select a template to create an effect'}, {'name': 'POV Text', 'description': 'Access POV text effects'}, {'name': 'Video Cutout', 'description': 'Access video cutout effects'}, {'name': 'Smile for Love', 'description': 'Access love-themed effects'}, {'name': 'AI Studio Photo', 'description': 'Access AI-generated photo effects'}, {'name': 'Cutout Reveal', 'description': 'Access cutout reveal effects'}]
